name: daytrail-helper
description: Read-only local connector for DayTrail activity, tasks, reports, and insights.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Codex about your local DayTrail work history.
interface.longDescription: DayTrail Helper connects Codex to the local DayTrail SQLite database in read-only mode. Use it to summarize today, search recent activity, inspect open tasks, review AI tool usage, and pull generated reports without opening the DayTrail app.
defaultPrompt: Search DayTrail for recent AI usage.
